text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Last night, I dreamt about a white rabbit... It kept
giving me riddles...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The riddle was, "What do bearded seals and
brooms have in common?"

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But I couldn't figure out the answer... and it kept
me awake...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Manhattan Cafe got so obsessed with
the riddle that she lost out on sleep...
